briefdescription.para: Initializes the Warp Filter driver instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the driver instance with the provided configuration structure. It sets up the base address, marks the instance as ready, and initializes descriptor-related fields.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS indicating successful initialization.
This function is only available when not compiling for Linux.
Both InstancePtr and ConfigPtr must not be NULL.

briefdescription.para: Starts the Warp Filter core.

detaileddescription.para: This function triggers the start of the Warp Filter processing by setting the AP_START bit in the control register while preserving the auto-restart bit.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Warp Filter core has finished processing.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the AP_DONE bit from the control register to determine if the core has completed its current operation.

simplesect.para: 1 if processing is done, 0 otherwise.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Warp Filter core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the AP_IDLE bit from the control register to determine if the core is currently idle.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is idle, 0 otherwise.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Warp Filter core is ready for next input.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_START bit to determine if the core is ready to accept new input data.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is ready for next input, 0 otherwise.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Enables auto-restart mode for the Warp Filter core.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the auto-restart feature by setting the appropriate bit in the control register, allowing the core to automatically restart after completing each frame.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Disables auto-restart mode for the Warp Filter core.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart feature by clearing the control register, requiring manual start for each frame.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the flush bit to flush the Warp Filter pipeline.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the flush bit in the control register to initiate flushing of the internal pipeline. This is typically used to clear pending operations.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the flush done status.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the flush done status bit from the control register to determine if the flush operation has completed.

simplesect.para: Flush done status bit value (non-zero if flush is complete).
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the descriptor address for the Warp Filter.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the 64-bit descriptor address to the control registers, specifying the location of the descriptor structure in memory.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the descriptor address from the Warp Filter.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the 64-bit descriptor address from the control registers.

simplesect.para: 64-bit descriptor address.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the AXI master read interface base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the 64-bit base address for the AXI master read interface to the control registers.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit base address for AXI master read.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the AXI master read interface base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the 64-bit base address for the AXI master read interface from the control registers.

simplesect.para: 64-bit base address for AXI master read.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the AXI master read interface address for segment table.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the 64-bit address for reading segment table data via the AXI master interface.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the AXI master read interface address for segment table.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the 64-bit address for reading segment table data from the control registers.

simplesect.para: 64-bit address for segment table read.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the AXI master write interface base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the 64-bit base address for the AXI master write interface to the control registers.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit base address for AXI master write.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the AXI master write interface base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the 64-bit base address for the AXI master write interface from the control registers.

simplesect.para: 64-bit base address for AXI master write.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the secondary AXI master read interface base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the 64-bit base address for the secondary AXI master read interface (used for multi-plane formats) to the control registers.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit base address for secondary AXI master read.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the secondary AXI master read interface base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the 64-bit base address for the secondary AXI master read interface from the control registers.

simplesect.para: 64-bit base address for secondary AXI master read.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the secondary segment table read address.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the 64-bit address for reading secondary segment table data via the AXI master interface.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit address for secondary segment table read.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the secondary segment table read address.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the 64-bit address for reading secondary segment table data from the control registers.

simplesect.para: 64-bit address for secondary segment table read.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the secondary AXI master write interface base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the 64-bit base address for the secondary AXI master write interface (used for multi-plane formats) to the control registers.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit base address for secondary AXI master write.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the secondary AXI master write interface base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the 64-bit base address for the secondary AXI master write interface from the control registers.

simplesect.para: 64-bit base address for secondary AXI master write.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Enables global interrupts for the Warp Filter.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the global interrupt enable (GIE) bit, allowing the core to generate interrupts.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Disables global interrupts for the Warp Filter.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the global interrupt enable (GIE) bit, preventing the core from generating interrupts.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Enables specific interrupts for the Warp Filter.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the interrupt sources specified by the Mask parameter in the interrupt enable register.

parameterdescription.para: Bit mask of interrupts to enable.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Disables specific interrupts for the Warp Filter.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupt sources specified by the Mask parameter in the interrupt enable register.

parameterdescription.para: Bit mask of interrupts to disable.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Clears pending interrupts for the Warp Filter.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the interrupt status bits specified by the Mask parameter by writing to the interrupt status register.

parameterdescription.para: Bit mask of interrupts to clear.

simplesect.para: None
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the enabled interrupt mask.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the interrupt enable register to determine which interrupt sources are currently enabled.

simplesect.para: Bit mask of enabled interrupts.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the pending interrupt status.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the interrupt status register to determine which interrupts are currently pending.

simplesect.para: Bit mask of pending interrupts.
InstancePtr must not be NULL and must be in the ready state.
